description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using ruby:3.3 as the default image and including the Code-Quality template. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a ruby_3.0 job (image ruby:3.0) that runs gem install bundler rake, bundle install --jobs $(nproc) --path vendor, and bundle exec rake; add a ruby_3.3 job (image ruby:3.3) with the same three commands; add a cucumber job that runs gem install bundler, bundle install, and bundle exec cucumber; and add a doctest job that runs gem install bundler, bundle install, and bundle exec rake yard:doctest. In the deploy stage add a docker_build job that runs only on the master branch, uses the docker:20.10.11 image with a docker:20.10.11-dind service, sets DOCKER_HOST and DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR variables, logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, pulls $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest quietly (ignoring failure), builds the image with docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest ., and pushes it; also add a pages job that runs only on master, depends on ruby_3.3, moves demo/ to public/, moves coverage/ to public/coverage, and publishes the public/ directory as an artifact that expires in 30 days.
